MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON MAY-11-2005 IN 206, HEARING ORDERED FOR PLAINTIFF GENE LEE'S APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES WAS HELD. GENE LEE'S APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES WAS GRANTED. ALL UNPAID FEES AND COSTS SHALL BE DEEMED TO BE TAXABLE COSTS IF THE APPLICANT IS ENTITLED TO COSTS AND SHALL BE A LIEN ON ANY JUDGMENT RECOVERED BY THE APPLICANT AND SHALL BE PAID DIRECTLY TO THE CLERK BY THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR UPON SUCH RECOVERY.
